## Example

```esql
FROM employees
| WHERE RANGE_CONTAINS(TO_DATE_RANGE("1985-02-01..1985-03-01"), hire_date)
| KEEP emp_no, hire_date
| SORT emp_no
```

| emp_no:integer | hire_date:date |
| --- | --- |
| 10009 | 1985-02-18T00:00:00.000Z |
| 10048 | 1985-02-24T00:00:00.000Z |


Filter ranges that contain a target date or sub-range
